title: Tap the GET STARTED button
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the 'GET STARTED' button
expected_result: The user is navigated to a new screen

title: Verify the search bar is functional
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the search bar, Step 2: Enter '1234567890' into the search bar, Step 3: Tap the search icon
expected_result: The search results display relevant contact information

title: Verify the map displays a location pin
test_steps: Step 1: Observe the map
expected_result: A red pin is displayed on the map indicating a location

title: Verify the user profile card displays correct information
test_steps: Step 1: Observe the user profile card
expected_result: The profile picture, name 'Jennifer', and subtitle 'Top model' are displayed correctly

title: Verify the Facebook social media icon opens the Facebook app or website
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the Facebook social media icon
expected_result: The Facebook app or facebook.com opens

title: Verify the LinkedIn social media icon opens the LinkedIn app or website
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the LinkedIn social media icon
expected_result: The LinkedIn app or linkedin.com opens

title: Verify the Google+ social media icon opens the Google+ app or website

title: Verify the accessibility of the search bar

expected_result: The text in the search bar meets the accessibility criteria

test_steps: Step 1: Verify the social media icons are easily distinguishable
expected_result: The social media icons meet the accessibility criteria

title: Verify the accessibility of the CTA button
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the CTA button is clearly labeled and has good contrast
expected_result: The CTA button meets the accessibility criteria

title: Tap the 'Waist to Height Ratio' title
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the 'Waist to Height Ratio' title
expected_result: The screen remains unchanged

title: Enter '26' into the age field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '26' into the age field
expected_result: '26' remains visible in the age field

title: Enter '-1' into the age field

expected_result: The age field displays an error message

title: Select 'CM' in the units selection button
test_steps: Step 1: Tap the 'CM | KG' button
expected_result: 'CM' is selected in the units selection button

title: Enter '6' into the waist field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '6' into the waist field
expected_result: '6 cm' remains visible in the waist field

title: Enter '-1' into the waist field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '-1' into the waist field
expected_result: The waist field displays an error message

title: Enter '6' into the height field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '6' into the height field
expected_result: '6 cm' remains visible in the height field

title: Enter '-1' into the height field
test_steps: Step 1: Enter '-1' into the height field
expected_result: The height field displays an error message

test_steps: Step 1: Verify the title 'Waist to Height Ratio' is centered, 24sp, bold, sans-serif
expected_result: The title is centered, 24sp, bold, sans-serif

title: Verify the font size and typeface of the input fields
test_steps: Step 1: Verify the age field is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, Step 2: Verify the waist field is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif, Step 3: Verify the height field is left-aligned, 16sp, regular, sans-serif
